title: Krisa's Soulslike Modpack
description: SoulsLike Fantasy with Intriguing RPG Elements
body:
This is a modpack I made for a group of friends and I, it is a mix of soulslike combat, and normal RPG progression.
It includes decent optimization, a new farming system with farmers delight, better combat with combat rolling, new bosses, tens of new biomes, a completely reworked cave making it seem like a entirely new biome as well as new content in the nether and end.
Hope you all enjoy
